name: Gainsight
description: Gainsight is a customer success platform that helps enterprise SaaS companies reduce churn, increase expansion, and drive product adoption. This integration verifies employee access and API availability.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Gainsight instance as a Super Admin
2. Navigate to Administration > Connectors 2.0
3. Click Create Connection
4. Select 'Gainsight API' from the Connector dropdown
5. Enter a name for the connection
6. Select 'Access_Key' as the Authentication Type
7. Click 'Generate Access Key'
8. Copy the generated access key
9. Paste your Gainsight instance URL (e.g., https://yourcompany.gainsight.com) and the access key below

Note: Only Super Admins who are active in User Management can generate the API Access Key. The access key does not expire but can be regenerated.

credentialFields.label: Gainsight Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Gainsight tenant URL (e.g., https://yourcompany.gainsight.com). Found in your browser address bar when logged into Gainsight.

credentialFields.label: API Access Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Gainsight Administration > Connectors 2.0 > Create Connection > Gainsight API > Access_Key > Generate Access Key. Only Super Admins can generate this key.

checks.name: Gainsight App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the Gainsight REST API is accessible using the provided access key.

checks.name: Gainsight Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Gainsight users with their roles, license types, and active status to verify employee access controls.
